Whether it's debugging a tricky issue or automating a repetitive task, I find joy in making things more efficient and reliable. Always exploring, always learning.

person.name: Zaman Ahmad
person.bio: Zaman is an innovative cloud security leader with expertise in delivering enterprise-wide cloud and container security transformations in highly regulated environments.  Specialising in designing and implementing security architectures for cloud platforms, services, and workloads which mitigate security risks and align organisations with internal security standards and external compliance regulations.  Combining deep technical knowledge with strategic leadership to build, inspire, and lead geographically diverse teams to drive technology and security maturity across global enterprises.

person.name: Andre Tischer
person.bio: I'm an IT Consultant at adesso SE and a DevOps Engineer since 2019, specializing in cloud-native infrastructure and CI/CD automation. My core competencies include Kubernetes orchestration, pipeline engineering, and scalable deployments across AWS, Azure, and StackIT. Whether it's designing resilient clusters or optimizing build pipelines, I bridge development and operations with precision and performance.

person.name: Ansil H
person.bio: I'm an AI Ops Technical Lead at Cisco, working on building next-generation AI platforms, with a strong focus on cloud-native and Kubernetes ecosystems. I'm one of the organizers of CNCG Kochi chapter and AWS Community Days Kochi. I'm passionate about Cloud Native technologies and Linux. I'm a regular speaker of community events in Kerala.

person.name: Junichi Miyagawa
person.bio: I work as an IT infrastructure architect and Scrum Master. I have expertise in AWS, Azure, CloudNativeSecurity, Kubernetes, Infrastructure as Code(AWS CDK) and Platform Engineering.

person.name: Naveen Chandu
person.bio: I am a Site Reliability Engineer currently working with the Microsoft ADX team. With over 5 years of hands-on experience, I am a seasoned Kubernetes specialist and an avid IT and cloud enthusiast. My journey in the tech world began with Kubernetes, and it has been a thrilling adventure ever since. In my previous role as an AKS Engineer at Microsoft, I honed my skills in troubleshooting and resolving issues related to Kubernetes, ARO, ACI, ACR, and associated technologies such as Helm, Terraform, and Istio. My passion for cloud technologies drives me to continuously explore and engage with various CNCF tools.  Looking forward to connecting, collaborating, and contributing to this vibrant community!

person.name: Süleyman Kütükoğlu
person.bio: I am Süleyman from Türkiye, deeply involved in DevOps with a strong focus on Kubernetes. As a Co-Founder at RNG Technology GmbH, we facilitate comprehensive infrastructure solutions for businesses across Türkiye, Germany and Europe.

person.name: Abdul Shukor
person.bio: DevOps Engineer with a strong passion for Kubernetes.

person.name: Aleksander Didriksen
person.bio: Aleksander is a platform engineer with a passion for delivering a great end-user experience, whether it be in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid cloud. He enjoys integrating the best open source and proprietary projects into internal development platforms, and making use automation to deliver these at scale. With extensive experience in national and international IT solutions in both legacy and modern architectures, he feels confident in solving even the most complex challenges.

person.name: Andreas Grob
person.bio: After studying at TU Dortmund I worked mostly with C++ and later on containerizing developer environments. Having been a Jenkins Administrator for over 10 years it made perfect sense to become a DevOps Consultant at CloudBees. In this role I work with multiple enterprise customers on their Continous Integration journey in modern Kubernetes environments.

person.name: Cheolhwan Kim
person.bio: Hello. I'm a developer and engineer with a strong interest in DevOps and AI. I'm excited to have joined Kubestronaut, which was one of my goals! Thank you~ :D

person.name: Mathieu Taillandier
person.bio: Infra / DevSecOps Engineer, passionate about the Cloud Native ecosystem. I have worked on projects combining Kubernetes, and automation, especially in the space industry, and I am always seeking new challenges. Driven by a genuine thirst for knowledge, I see life as a path of continuous learning. Curious and open-minded, I am also exploring the intersection of Cloud and AI.  🌍 Excited to keep contributing to the CNCF community and open to opportunities abroad.
